title: Cobblemon Radical Changes
description: This adds all the edits from the popular rom hack Pokemon Radical Red into your game!
body:
This addon Requires Mega Showdown 9.6.8+

This adds all the moves and ability additions and edits from the popular rom hack Pokemon Radical Red into your game!

This is the first public addon that has Custom Moves, Conditions, and Abilities all into one using the new datapackable options in Mega Showdown

It also even has the lang files edited for yall so you can see the correct information with all the changes done!

Yes this also adds frostbite as well to replace freeze!

It even includes the Pokemon Changes and Movepool Changes!
